title: README: drop duplicate transcript
goal: Remove the inline text-transcript <details> block from 'See it in action'; replace it with a one-line image-not-loading pointer to the Quick start walkthrough (which already shows the same flow as text), eliminating the duplicate demo while keeping a fallback.

steps.title: Replace the transcript block with a pointer
steps.detail: Delete the entire <details>...</details> text-transcript block in 'See it in action'; in its place put one line linking to the Quick start walkthrough as the image-not-loading fallback.

steps.title: Verify links and length
steps.detail: Confirm the #quick-start anchor link works, the GIF + caption stay intact, no stray <details>/console-block leftovers, no double blanks, wc -l README.md.
